About me

MY PROFILE

What sets me apart in IT solutions is that I help my clients achieve their goals with work oriented to their needs. I have years of experience in the industry and know many of its details in depth. I have dedicated myself to building custom-made computers with artisanal cases and cooling systems for home use, as well as infrastructures for corporate use in a wide variety of SMEs.

Experience

IT Solutions – TecnOtakus

2015 - Present

Personal venture, dedicated to PC maintenance and repair, server optimization, network infrastructure installation, custom cooling prototype manufacturing, product sales and online marketing of the brand. Work at both home and corporate level.

Automotive Electrical – Lubricantes Villars

2018 - Present

Family venture. Repair of automotive electronic failures, system scanning and diagnostics.
